Content Workflow

Ideation / Storehouse

Assets, inspiration, and draft ideas — all in one place.

Google Drive — your live asset library. Images, logos, fonts, video, audio.
Connect your Drive folder
Paste a Google Drive folder URL above to embed your asset library — images, logos, fonts, video clips, and audio files.
Tip: Make sure the folder is shared with "Anyone with the link can view" so all team members can access it.
Nothing here yet
Paste a URL above to add your first inspiration card.
No draft ideas yet
Type an idea above and hit Save Draft to capture it here.
